# ✨ Feature Request – Asyncio Plugin

Briefly describe the proposed feature.

---

Why would this feature improve the plugin?

- Performance?
- Usability?
- Safety?
- Debugging?
- Architecture?

If you have ideas on how it could be implemented, describe them here.

---

## ⚠️ Considerations

- [ ] Async/thread safety
- [ ] Memory isolation
- [ ] Token handling
- [ ] Cooldown logic
- [ ] IRC formatting
- [ ] Moderation behaviour

Add screenshots, examples, or explanations here.
